**RE: CASE NO. 2025-137857 - NOTICE OF WITHDRAWAL FROM SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS DATED
18 SEPTEMBER 2025**

Dear Sirs,

We refer to the above matter and the purported settlement agreements signed on 18 September
2025.

sections.heading: 1. WITHDRAWAL FROM AGREEMENTS
sections.content:
We hereby give notice of our immediate withdrawal from all settlement agreements signed on 18
September 2025 based on multiple grounds, each independently sufficient to void these agreements.

sections.heading: 2. GROUNDS FOR WITHDRAWAL
sections.content:
#44# 2.1 IMMEDIATE FUNDAMENTAL BREACH BY PETER FAUCITT

On 19 September 2025, merely one day after signing, Peter Faucitt materially breached the
settlement by:
